titlestmt.titleproper: New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics (NYSAND) records8781
titlestmt.author: Keating, Eileen

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-08 19:03:41 UTC.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics (NYSAND) records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics

did.abstract: The New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics was founded in 1930 in Rochester, New York. Records include meeting minutes, newsletters, bylaws, organization history, directories, handbooks, pamphlets, photographs, scrapbooks, and correspondence.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Meeting minutes, newsletters, bylaws, organization history, directories, handbooks, pamphlets, photographs, scrapbooks, and correspondence.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The NYSAND is an organization of nutrition professionals, residing, working or attending school in New York State. Affiliated with the Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics, there are ten district associations within NYSAND, covering all regions of the state, from Long Island to Plattsburgh, to the Southern Tier. The New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics was founded in 1930 in Rochester, New York by fourteen dietitians. A constitution was adopted and it was voted to affiliate with the Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics (NYSAND) records, #8781. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

controlaccess.subject: Dietetics
Diet.
Nutrition.
Nutrition disorders
controlaccess.corpname: New York State Academy of Nutrition and Dietetics

did.unittitle: Series I. History
Certificate of Incorporation and related correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes the original certificate of incorporation from April 30, 1970.

did.unittitle: Organization history, Book I
A History of New York State Dietetic Association 1930-1963
Series II. Governance
A. Meeting Minutes
Executive Board meeting minutes

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minutes for June 1945 till January 1951 are missing.

Series III. Annual Meetings
2nd-10th annual meeting programs, memos, articles
11th-18th annual meeting programs, memos, articles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1942 Theme: Teamwork for Victory; 1944 Theme: Food and Nutrition in a Changing World; 1946 Theme: Nutrition in the World Today; 1947 Theme: Nutrition in Action; 1948 Theme: Meeting the Challenge of Today

did.unittitle: 19th-29th annual meeting programs, memos, articles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1950 Theme: Human Relationships in the Home Economics Professions; 1951 Theme: Nutritional Horizons; 1957 Theme: Feeding with an Internatiional Flavor; 1958 Theme: The Challenge of Change

did.unittitle: 30th-39th annual meeting programs, memos, articles

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 1960 Theme: Our Heritage..Our Horizons; 1961 Theme: New Dimension of Action in Dietetics; 1962 Theme: Our Challenges in the Space Age; 1963 Theme: Focus on the Future; 1964 Theme: Patways for Professional Progress; 1966 Theme: Patterns for Progress; 1967 Theme: Tomorrow's Challenge; 1968 Theme: Capital Trends; 1969 Theme: Expanding Frontiers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Theme: Decade of Decision: Meeting Human Needs in our Changing World
